title: Principal AI Engineer
company_focus:
Water, hygiene, and infection prevention solutions and
services
description:
Job Characteristics: Define the architectural vision and
governance standards for GenAI solutions at scale. Lead the
design of intelligent systems leveraging LLMs, agentic
workflows, and vector-based retrieval strategies, while
ensuring alignment with enterprise-level goals around
security, performance, and reusability. This role operates
at the intersection of deep technical expertise and cross-
functional leadership.

Education/Work Experience: Degree and 10-12 years
experience.

Independence Level/Reports to: Normally reports to AI
Engineering Manager or Director.
responsibilities: Define the architectural vision and governance standards for GenAI solutions at scale
Lead the design of intelligent systems leveraging LLMs and agentic workflows
Design and implement vector-based retrieval strategies for AI solutions
Ensure alignment of AI systems with enterprise-level security, performance, and reusability goals
Provide cross-functional leadership bridging deep technical expertise with business objectives
Establish best practices and standards for GenAI solution development across the enterprise
use_cases: Intelligent document retrieval and search via vector-based strategies
Agentic workflow automation for enterprise processes
LLM-powered enterprise applications with security and governance compliance
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role is directly focused on defining architecture and
governance for GenAI solutions, designing intelligent
systems leveraging LLMs, agentic workflows, and vector-based
retrieval strategies. The principal engineer is hands-on
with AI system design and deployment at scale, making this
clearly an ai-first role.
